response.original_title: Chabot Big Band Jazz Concert featuring Bryan Davis
response.overview: The Chabot College Jazz Studies program continued its high-octane Spring 2026 concert season with a thrilling big band showcase, headlined by an internationally acclaimed trumpet virtuoso.  Bryan Davis: A world-renowned lead trumpet player and educator based out of New York, Davis brought his blistering range, impeccable technique, and signature high-note artistry to the East Bay. Known globally for his work with top-tier ensembles like the Vanguard Jazz Orchestra, Arturo Sandoval, and various Broadway orchestras, Davis also widespread recognition for his "Airflow Music" educational platform and daily practice advocacy.
response.title: Chabot Big Band Jazz Concert featuring Bryan Davis
